request_payload.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The recent exercises proved that only through strong, committed partnerships can we maintain credible deterrence. Some politicians talk about 'going it alone,' but that's a dangerous fantasy in today's world. Our allies share the burden when it counts - just look at the coordinated response to last year's cyber threats. We can't afford to weaken these bonds. #StrongerTogether #NATOWorks
